chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I. A. No. 41 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’. 2. For order on CMA No.2119/2023 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For order on CMA No.2120/2023 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 03.04.2024 None present for the appellants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This matter was called in the morning, however, it was kept aside to be taken up in the second half as the counsel is from Hyderabad. This is now 11:25 a.m. Neither any of the appellants has attended nor did their counsel. It seems that they have lost interest in pursuing this matter and there is no intimation either. We have waited for some time but all in vain. The appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
